pool.clearHint: Empty the picker pool and reset the selection

stage.preparingWorkflowDetail: Hang on — converting workflow to api JSON. Try Run again in a moment.

error.upstreamNotReadyDetail: Upstream not ready: {list}. Run those stage(s) first so they produce a snapshot, then Run this stage again.
error.workerDied: Backend stopped without sending a result. The prompt worker likely died (CUDA OOM during cleanup is the usual cause). Restart ComfyUI to recover.

servers.title: ComfyUI Servers
servers.addTooltip: Register another ComfyUI instance on your network so stages can run on it
servers.empty: No remote servers configured. Stages run on this machine. Add a server to unlock the per-stage server dropdown and run stages on several machines in parallel.
servers.deleteConfirm: Delete server "{label}"? Stages currently pointed at it will fall back to running locally.

form.label: Name
form.saveFailed: Save failed — is the name already in use?

job.fallbackLocal: Selected server is gone or disabled — this stage will run locally.

caps.missingTitle: Nodes missing on this remote — upgrade its ComfyTV:

preflight.noComfyTV: Remote "{label}" doesn't have ComfyTV installed — install ComfyTV there or run locally.
preflight.missingNode: Remote "{label}" is missing node {node} — upgrade its ComfyTV.
preflight.missingResource: Remote "{label}" is missing resource {file} — run anyway?
preflight.resourceMismatch: Resource {file} has different content on remote "{label}" — run anyway?

stageManager.title: Stage Manager
stageManager.rescanTooltip: Scan ComfyTV/workflows/ on disk for new, changed, or removed workflow files — no backend restart needed
stageManager.rescanNoneDetail: Make sure the file is a .json inside ComfyTV/workflows/<kind>/ (preset and .api.json sidecars don't count).
stageManager.emptyWorkflows: No workflows registered for this stage yet — import one here, or drop a .json into ComfyTV/workflows/<kind>/ and hit Rescan.
stageManager.hint: Workflows listed here are picked from the workflow dropdown on the matching stage node on the canvas.

badge.linkedHint: Linked from ComfyUI's native workflow folder (not managed by ComfyTV)
badge.notGuiHint: Missing a top-level nodes array — open it in ComfyUI and re-save normally, not with Save (API Format)
badge.noApiHint: The API prompt is generated automatically the first time this workflow runs — normal for a freshly imported workflow.
badge.newHint: Discovered in the most recent scan (startup or rescan)
badge.builtinHint: Ships with ComfyTV (tracked in git). Workflows without this badge were imported or dropped in by a user.

assets.title: Asset Library
assets.empty: No assets yet — add images, video, or audio to reuse them across projects.
assets.emptyCategory: No assets in this category yet.
assets.addTooltip: Upload images, video, or audio into the library (or drag & drop them onto this panel)
assets.dropHint: Drop files to add them to the library
assets.scanFolderHint: Drop large files into this folder — they are adopted on scan without uploading

category.deleteConfirm: Delete this category? It is removed from all assets; the assets and files on disk stay.

card.deleteConfirm: Remove this asset from the library? The file on disk stays.

assetLoader.empty: No matching assets in the library yet — add some in the Assets panel.
assetLoader.pickHint: Pick an asset from the library to use as this node's output.

stageParams.addHint: Attach a parameter defined in the ComfyTV sidebar

sidebar.title: Stage Parameters
sidebar.empty: No parameters defined for this stage yet.
sidebar.label: Label
sidebar.sliderHint: Set both min & max to show a slider on the node (otherwise a number field).
sidebar.deleteConfirm: Delete this parameter? Workflows binding to it will lose the binding.

promptHelper.open: Prompt helper — quick starters & enhancement tags

cameraPrompt.open: Cinematic camera — compile camera/lens/aperture into the prompt
cameraPrompt.empty: Pick a camera, lens, focal length or aperture to build a cinematic suffix.

imageRefs.title: Image references
imageRefs.empty: No reference images — click + to pin one from the library.
imageRefs.warnDuplicate: Reference slot #{n} is pinned by multiple images — only the last one applies at run.
imageRefs.warnOverride: Reference slot #{n} already has an upstream connection — the pinned image overrides it at run.
imageRefs.warnOverflow: The workflow binds only {total} reference slot(s) — {count} pinned image(s) won't be consumed.
imageRefs.warnNoSlots: This workflow has no image input that can receive reference images — they'll be ignored at run.

promptAssets.addTooltip: Insert an image asset from the library — it will be sent as a reference image at run
promptAssets.empty: No matching assets — add some in the sidebar Assets tab.
promptAssets.missing: asset #{id} was removed from the library — this chip is ignored at run
promptAssets.slotEmpty: This workflow has no reference-image slots bound yet — bind a LoadImage to "Upstream image #N" in the sidebar workflow config first.

configSidebar.title: Workflow Config
configSidebar.empty: Select a stage node on the canvas to edit its workflow config. Imported workflows are picked from the node's workflow dropdown — see the Stages tab for the full list.
configSidebar.noWorkflowPicked: This stage's workflow combo is empty — pick one first.
configSidebar.noExposedWidgets: This workflow has no editable widgets, or hasn't been prepared yet — pick it on any stage first so the browser can analyze it.
configSidebar.pickWorkflowFirst: Pick this workflow on any stage first to populate widget metadata (the browser-side graphToPrompt has to run).
configSidebar.exportPresetTooltip: Download the current bindings as a *_preset.json file. Drop it next to the workflow JSON in workflows/<kind>/ to ship these defaults to other users.
configSidebar.resetToPresetTooltip: Wipe all bindings + meta for this workflow and re-apply its shipped _preset.json from disk. Your own edits will be lost.
configSidebar.resetToPresetConfirm: Reset all bindings for this workflow to the shipped preset? Your edits will be lost.
configSidebar.conversionMayHaveFailed: ComfyTV may have failed to convert this workflow. Export an API-format JSON from ComfyUI (Save (API Format)) and upload it here — name it as the matching .api.json next to the workflow.
configSidebar.uploadApiTooltip: Attach a Save (API Format) export to this workflow. It's stored as <name>.api.json next to the workflow and used directly, skipping conversion.
configSidebar.uploadApiOk: API prompt saved ({n} nodes) — workflow ready.
configSidebar.resultHintAuto: Auto-detected from save / preview nodes. Pick a node to override which one produces this stage's output.
configSidebar.resultHintSet: This node's output is used as the stage result.
configSidebar.linkedSourceHint: This workflow lives in ComfyUI's own library. Edit it there and save — changes sync automatically.
configSidebar.linkBrokenHint: The source workflow is missing from ComfyUI's library (moved, renamed, or deleted). Re-create it or unlink.
configSidebar.unlinkConfirm: Unlink "{label}"? The ComfyUI workflow file is kept — only the ComfyTV reference is removed.
configSidebar.noMatchingNodes: No nodes match the current filter.

project.label: Current Project
project.delete: Delete this project (files on disk stay)
project.delete_confirm: Delete this project? DB rows will be cleared; files on disk stay.

edit.label: Edit Image
edit.tooltip: Edits that change size or need rich UI (HD / outpaint / inpaint / erase / cutout / crop)

panorama.label: Panorama
panorama.tooltip: Turn this image into a panorama and explore viewpoints

multiangle.label: Multi-angle
multiangle.tooltip: Re-render this image from a different camera angle

relight.label: Relight
relight.tooltip: Spawn a Relight light-source node plus an image stage preset to the relight workflow — place 3D lights or pick a reference image, then run the image stage

material.label: Material
material.tooltip: Spawn a Material node wired to this image — Run estimates PBR parameters (color, roughness, transparency…) from the picture via a local VLM

preset.label: Presets
preset.tooltip: Size-preserving, no-rich-UI preset transforms (multi-view / grid / scene progression)

extend.label: Extend
extend.tooltip: Extract this clip's last frame and spawn a new VideoStage using it as the I2V start frame — write a prompt for the continuation

change.label: Edit Video
change.tooltip: Modify an existing video: clip / HD / subtitle erase / audio separation

refine.label: Refine
refine.tooltip: Continue rewriting in a new TextStage

view-current.label: Current View
view-current.tooltip: Extract the current viewport as a single image

view-four.label: 4 Views
view-four.tooltip: Extract 4 viewpoints as an image batch

view-twelve.label: 12 Views
view-twelve.tooltip: Extract 12 viewpoints as an image batch

gen-shots.label: Generate Shot Images
gen-shots.tooltip: Spawn a Shot Images stage wired to this storyboard — iterates the shot list and renders one image per shot

product-shot.label: Product Shot
product-shot.tooltip: Spawn an image-edit stage preset to Qwen Edit 2511, wired to this 3D capture — keeps the subject's colors and materials while turning the render into a studio product photo; edit the prompt to taste

stagePresets.nameReserved: This name is reserved by a built-in preset

panel.title: Stage Presets
panel.empty: No presets yet. Use the save button on a stage node to create one.

panel.title: Resources
panel.empty: No files yet. Upload one to use it in stages.

resources.removeConfirm: Remove "{name}" from the library? The file stays on disk.

multi-cam-9.label: Multi-cam 9-grid
multi-cam-9.tooltip: 9 camera angles arranged in a grid

cinematic-light.label: Cinematic Lighting
cinematic-light.tooltip: Apply cinematic lighting and color grade

hd.label: HD
hd.tooltip: Upscale to a higher resolution (output is larger)

outpaint.label: Outpaint
outpaint.tooltip: Extend the canvas outward (output is larger)

cutout.label: Cutout
cutout.tooltip: Extract the subject with a transparent background

rotate.label: Rotate
rotate.tooltip: Rotate by an angle (browser-side, no GPU)

grid.label: Grid Split
grid.tooltip: Slice into an R×C grid of tiles (browser-side) → image batch

ken-burns.label: Ken Burns
ken-burns.tooltip: Animated zoom & pan into a video

clip.label: Clip
clip.tooltip: Clip / trim — pick start and end times

crop.label: Crop
crop.tooltip: Spatial crop — keep a rectangle (x, y, w, h) of every frame

resize.label: Resize
resize.tooltip: Scale video to a target width × height (use -1 to auto-derive from aspect)

extract-frame.label: Extract Frame
extract-frame.tooltip: Pull a single frame out as an image (first / last / middle / custom seconds)

split.label: Split
split.tooltip: Cut the clip in two at a point — outputs part A and part B

speed.label: Speed
speed.tooltip: Speed up / slow down (0.25x–4x) or reverse playback

rotate.label: Rotate / Flip
rotate.tooltip: Rotate by 90° steps and/or mirror horizontally / vertically

volume.label: Volume
volume.tooltip: Adjust audio gain with optional fade in / fade out

mux-audio.label: Mux Audio
mux-audio.tooltip: Replace or mix in a new audio track (wire an audio upstream too)

concat.label: Concat
concat.tooltip: Join multiple videos in order — wire more clips into the new node

frames.label: Extract Frames
frames.tooltip: Mark multiple timestamps and pull them all out as an image batch

subtitle-select.label: Region Subtitle Erase
subtitle-select.tooltip: Manually box a region to erase (needs region-selector UI)

demux.label: Demux A/V
demux.tooltip: Split into audio track + silent video (two nodes spawned)

color.label: Color
color.tooltip: Grade: exposure, temperature, hue/sat and 3-way color wheels

chroma-key.label: Chroma Key
chroma-key.tooltip: Green/blue-screen key → alpha WebM or b/w matte

scene-detect.label: Scene Detect
scene-detect.tooltip: Find hard cuts, one thumbnail per scene

interpolate.label: Interpolate
interpolate.tooltip: Optical-flow retime to higher fps or smooth slow-mo

stylize.label: Stylize
stylize.tooltip: Vignette / grain / pixelize / sepia / old film

scopes.label: Scopes
scopes.tooltip: Waveform / vectorscope / histogram of a frame

composite.label: Composite
composite.tooltip: Layer another clip on top — 39 blend modes

corner-pin.label: Corner Pin
corner-pin.tooltip: Perspective-pin the frame by its four corners

roto-mask.label: Roto Mask
roto-mask.tooltip: Draw a Bezier shape → feathered matte video

motion-track.label: Motion Track
motion-track.tooltip: Track a point; feed the track into Transform/Composite

title.label: Title
title.tooltip: Burn a styled title with fades

subtitles.label: Subtitles
subtitles.tooltip: Burn SRT/VTT subtitles into the clip

time-remap.label: Time Remap
time-remap.tooltip: Keyframed speed ramps (slow-mo ↔ fast) on one curve

sequence.label: Sequence
sequence.tooltip: Order clips with per-segment trim and transitions

paint.label: Paint
paint.tooltip: Clone / blur / color brush repair strokes

uv-remap.label: UV Remap
uv-remap.tooltip: STMap/IDistort displacement via a UV map

mask-propagate.label: Mask Propagate
mask-propagate.tooltip: Track a first-frame mask through the clip

speech-to-text.label: Auto Subtitles
speech-to-text.tooltip: Speech-to-text workflow → SRT for the Subtitles stage

hue-correct.label: Hue Correct
hue-correct.tooltip: Hue-domain curves: sat/lum/RGB gains and suppression

motion-track-solve.label: Track & Solve
motion-track-solve.tooltip: Multi-point track solved to Transform / Corner Pin

pik-keyer.label: PIK Keyer
pik-keyer.tooltip: Image-based greenscreen keying with a clean plate

keyer.label: Keyer
keyer.tooltip: Luma / color / screen keyer with soft ramps

despill.label: Despill
despill.tooltip: Remove green/blue spill from keyed footage

color-suppress.label: Color Suppress
color-suppress.tooltip: Suppress a color channel or its complement

key-mix.label: Key Mix
key-mix.tooltip: A over B through an external mask

matte-morph.label: Matte Morphology
matte-morph.tooltip: Erode / dilate / open / close a matte

frame-blend.label: Frame Blend
frame-blend.tooltip: Blend frame windows or shutter samples

annotate.label: Annotate
annotate.tooltip: Boxes, grids, border fills and scrolling

audio-meter.label: Audio Meter
audio-meter.tooltip: Burn a live volume meter onto the video

fx-chain.label: FX Chain
fx-chain.tooltip: Chain multiple FX specs into one render pass

videoTrim.noInputVideo: No input video — connect a video upstream
videoTrim.adjustThenRun: Drag the handles to pick a range, then Run

videoConcat.noInputs: No input videos — connect videos upstream
videoConcat.needTwo: Connect at least two videos to concat
videoConcat.dragToReorder: Drag tiles to set the concat order
videoConcat.readyToRun: {n} clips in order — Run to concat

videoSpeed.reverseTip: Play the clip backwards (applied on Run)
videoSpeed.reverseNote: Reverse is applied on Run — preview plays forward
videoSpeed.adjustThenRun: Pick a speed (preview plays at it), then Run

videoRotate.adjustThenRun: Rotate / flip (preview is live), then Run

videoSplit.done: Split done — A and B ready for downstream
videoSplit.adjustThenRun: Drag the handle to place the cut, then Run

videoVolume.previewCapNote: Preview caps at 100% — extra gain is applied on Run
videoVolume.adjustThenRun: Set volume / fades (preview is live ≤100%), then Run

videoMux.noAudio: No audio input — connect one upstream
videoMux.needBoth: Connect both a video and an audio upstream
videoMux.adjustThenRun: Pick replace/mix and offset, then Run

videoFrames.addFirst: Scrub to a frame and add marks, then Run

videoResize.adjustThenRun: Set target size or pick a preset, then Run

videoCrop.adjustThenRun: Frame the crop rectangle, then Run

imageCrop.noInputImage: No input image — connect an image upstream
imageCrop.adjustToApply: Drag the rectangle or pick a ratio to apply

panorama.empty: No panorama yet — upload an HDRI / equirect image or click Run with an upstream image
panorama.clearUploadTooltip: Drop the manual source — Run will then derive from upstream again

imageCompare.noImages: Connect two images to compare (A / B)

storyboard.empty: No shots yet — Run to generate from the premise, or add shots manually
storyboard.regenerate: Regenerate this shot via the LLM (keeps the rest)

storyboardEditor.noUpstreamData: Upstream storyboard is empty — run the Storyboard node first
storyboardEditor.animaticReady: Animatic rendered - video output is ready for downstream
storyboardEditor.noScenesFound: No scenes found in the script (Fountain format; use an @ prefix for character names)
storyboardEditor.suggestDurationHint: Duration estimated from the dialogue - click to apply
storyboardEditor.captions: Captions (C) - overlay dialogue in playback and exports
storyboardEditor.hotkeysHint: , . boards · N new · D duplicate · P play · O onion · / new shot

timeline.connectImages: Connect images upstream to use as shots
timeline.clickKeyframe: Click a keyframe above to add a shot
timeline.noAudio: Connect audio upstream to add a track

gridSplit.pickGrid: Pick a grid preset or set rows × cols
gridSplit.done: Split into {n} tiles — ready for downstream

panoramaView.orbitToCapture: Drag to look around — releasing captures the view
panoramaView.adjustCountToCapture: Move the slider to capture views

rotate.adjustToApply: Slide or click a quick angle to apply

lightBall.noLights: Add a light to get started.

mention.invalidLabel: Invalid label — start with a letter / underscore (Chinese is fine), then letters / digits / _ / -
mention.noEntries: No entries yet — type a label to create one
mention.contentPlaceholder: Content this {'@'}-token expands to. (For characters / other kinds, use the ComfyTV button → Entries dialog.)
mention.imageItemTitle: Slot #{n} — expands at run to "{text}" (by actual send order)
mention.imageTooltipMissing: Slot #{n} has no image right now — this token is dropped at run

entries.title: Entries
entries.movedNotice: Entry management has moved to the ComfyTV left sidebar — open the "Entries" tab there.
entries.movedNoticeDeprecation: This dialog will be removed in the next release.
entries.importTooltip: Import entries from a JSON backup — rows identical to an existing entry are skipped, everything else is added as new
entries.exportTooltip: Export all entries of this project as a JSON backup
entries.importResult: Imported {added} new, skipped {dup} duplicate and {invalid} invalid.
entries.importError: Import failed: not a valid entries JSON file.
entries.refHelpPre: Reference any entry in a stage's prompt with
entries.confirmDelete: Delete {'@'}{label}? Existing {'@'}{label} tokens will fall back to literal text.
entries.labelError: Start with a letter / underscore (Chinese is fine), then letters / digits / _ / -

valuePreview.fromUpstream: From the connected upstream batch — remove it upstream, not here

run.stagesRunPerNode: ComfyTV stages run individually — use each node's Run button. Nothing to run with the global Run here.

workflowLink.title: Link a ComfyUI workflow
workflowLink.intro: Link a workflow from ComfyUI's own library. Edit it normally in ComfyUI and save — ComfyTV picks up your changes automatically.
workflowLink.empty: No workflows found in ComfyUI's library.

scene3d.fitToSceneHint: Rescale the model to scene size, center it and rest it on the ground
scene3d.noSelection: Add a character, object or light to start.
scene3d.webcodecsUnsupported: Video recording needs WebCodecs (VideoEncoder), which this browser lacks.
scene3d.noDurationToRecord: Nothing to record: add a camera preset, an animated character, or set a frame count.
scene3d.failedToInit: Failed to initialize the 3D scene editor.
scene3d.lightGizmoHint: Lights use dedicated handles: orbit rings for directional, position/target arrows for point and spot.
scene3d.failedToLoadModelAsset: Failed to load the 3D model asset.
scene3d.lookThroughGizmoHint: Exit the camera view to move this camera — you're looking through it.
scene3d.cameraPresetGizmoHint: This camera follows a preset path — dragging (move) adjusts the path offset; rotation is baked (tune with yaw/roll).

modelLoader.empty: No 3D models in input/3d yet — upload one to get started.

modelBinder.noModel: Pick or upload a model above first
modelBinder.pickHint: Click the model to select a part, then click a material to bind it

meshOps.runToGenerate: Set parameters, then Run to generate
meshOps.needTwoModels: Connect two models (A and B) to combine
meshOps.placeThenRun: Pick A or B, drag the gizmo to place it, then Run

splitPart.noInputImage: Connect an image to annotate parts
splitPart.hint: Click to add points to the active part (right-click = exclude); drag with Box to mark a part per box. Or leave empty and type a concept for the text workflow.

loaderDrop.assetTypeMismatch: This node loads {expected}, but the dropped asset is {actual}.

layerEditor.captureHint: Upload composite + one image per visible layer
layerEditor.noLayers: No layers yet — drop an image here
layerEditor.dropHint: Drop image to add a layer

fxChain.title: FX Chain
fxChain.empty: Chain FX nodes along the video wire into this node

fx.chainMode: Adjust freely — an FX Chain node downstream renders once
fx.makeProxyHint: Large source — generate a lightweight proxy for smooth preview (Run still uses the original)
fx.needsTwoInputs: Wire two videos into A and B
fx.needsAudioOrVideo: Wire an audio or video input
fx.previewNote: Preview is approximate — Run renders precisely
fx.curveHint: Click to add · drag to move · right-click deletes
fx.lumaPreviewHint: Luma wipe preview shows a crossfade — run to see the final wipe
fx.detectHint: Run scans for hard cuts and outputs one thumbnail per scene
fx.sceneClipsHint: Run splits the video at each cut into per-scene clips — wire the clips output into a Video Picker
fx.sceneClipPickHint: Click a clip to select it — re-run and the clips output becomes that clip
fx.eqHint: Double-click adds a band · drag moves · wheel = Q · double-click a dot removes
fx.noLuts: No LUTs yet — upload a .cube file
fx.lutPreviewUnavailable: Live preview supports .cube and .3dl only — this LUT is applied on run
fx.dragHint: Drag the frame to move · wheel to scale
fx.rotoHint: Click adds a point · drag moves · double-click a point removes it
fx.trackHint: Click the frame to set the track point

afx.needsSrcAndIr: Wire a source audio and an IR audio
afx.sweepHint: Generates a Farina ESS sweep — play it in a room, record the response, then use Deconvolve
afx.deconvHint: Feed the recorded sweep response; parameters must match the Sweep node
afx.echoFeedbackNote: Infinite repeats, exact Audacity Echo structure
afx.speedNote: atempo keeps pitch while changing speed
afx.needsTwoAudio: Wire two audio (or video) inputs into A and B
afx.analyzeHint: Run measures the audio and prints a report

scopes.wireHint: Wire a live-preview node (Color / Curves / Blur / Stylize / Chroma Key) for live scopes
